name: AdRoll Retargeting & Display API
what_it_does: Retargeting and performance marketing platform by NextRoll with REST API — enabling e-commerce and B2C brands to run retargeting ads across display, social, and email channels, with AI-powered audience segmentation, cross-device attribution, and unified campaign management.
use_cases: Automating retargeting campaign management for e-commerce product catalogs via API
Syncing customer segments from CDP to AdRoll for audience targeting
Querying campaign performance and ROAS for automated budget reallocation
Integrating AdRoll attribution data with analytics or data warehouse pipelines
Managing product feed updates for dynamic retargeting ad generation
not_for: B2B account-based marketing (use RollWorks for ABM targeting)
Brand awareness campaigns without direct response goals
Search advertising (use Google Ads or Microsoft Ads)
best_when: An e-commerce brand wants unified retargeting across display, social, and email channels with AI audience segmentation and multi-touch attribution, managed via API.
avoid_when: You primarily need B2B ABM advertising (use RollWorks), search ads, or you want to manage channels independently rather than through a unified platform.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow via NextRoll identity (shared with RollWorks). Scopes for advertisable, segment, and campaign management. Same NextRoll OAuth2 infrastructure as RollWorks. Token refresh required. Webhook for conversion events.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan available for basic retargeting; limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Growth $36/month; Advanced custom; minimum ad spend recommended
pricing.notes: Division of NextRoll. San Francisco-based. Founded 2007. Pioneer in retargeting technology. Processes 200B+ events/day. E-commerce integrations (Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce). More accessible pricing than enterprise alternatives. AI-powered audience segmentation differentiator.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for advertisables, segments, ads, campaigns, and reports. OAuth2 shared with RollWorks. Good developer documentation. Pixel must be installed for retargeting. Product catalog feed required for dynamic ads. Conversion events tracked via pixel or API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Segment reads idempotent. Ad reads idempotent. Report queries idempotent by date range. Campaign creation may create duplicates — use external ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Pixel installation required on advertiser website before retargeting data available
OAuth2 shared with RollWorks — scopes are product-specific, not interchangeable
Dynamic retargeting requires product catalog feed in correct format
Attribution windows configurable — default may not match your attribution model
GDPR consent required for EU user retargeting — implement consent management

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CCPA compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with NextRoll identity. Retargeting involves user behavioral data — consent management critical. IAB TCF 2.0 compliant. Third-party cookie alternatives (first-party data and hashed email) supported.
